title: psychotria glabra
intro: Psychotria glabra, also known as Smooth Psyote, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Psychotria glabra include reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating pain, and treating fever and other inflammatory conditions. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and well-being.
